_comment: Deploy-UPES.ps1 WinForms installer UI strings. English reference/default catalog. Keys are stable; {0} placeholders are positional and MUST be preserved in translations. \n = line break. English is the guaranteed fallback (also embedded in the .ps1); any missing key here or in a translation file falls back to English.
subtitle: Pick a language, then click Deploy. That is all.
status_deploying: Deploying... (this can take several minutes on first run)
msg_ok_body:
UPES-ECS is up.

Phones register to  {0}:5060
Emergency number    dial 111
Console             http://localhost:8080
msg_fail_body:
Deployment did not finish (exit code {0}).

Read the log for the last error line, fix it, and click Deploy again.
msg_nosource_body: Tick is on but no Source is set. Enter a URL, a .zip, or a folder - or untick to deploy the built-in copy.
